title: Calc 251 (OSU calculus)
html:
Stub. The spring-2025 calculus course at OSU whose D2L quizzes Yahir screenshotted across May 2025: tangent lines (May 2), log/cosine derivatives (May 13), inverse-trig derivatives (May 16), full derivative-table drill (May 22). Title-numbering inferred from OSU catalog convention; could be MATH 251.
